summary: M4 (Downstream enrichment flow): Created scripts/enrich-project.py — a manifest-driven enrichment script that resolves capability profiles and copies agents, docs, hooks, scripts, and a rendered .claude/CLAUDE.md to downstream projects. Refactored bootstrap-new-project.sh and adopt-existing-repo.sh to delegate to the enrichment script. Fixed duplicate M4 naming conflict in META_PHASES.md (execution modes → M4.5, containerization → M5.5). Updated USAGE_PATTERNS.md with concrete enrichment commands. Updated example READMEs with expected directory structures. Code-reviewer caught three blocking issues (force flag on CLAUDE.md, $2→$1 in shell scripts, cycle detection in profile resolution) — all fixed.
changes: Refactored scripts/bootstrap-new-project.sh to delegate to enrich-project.py
Refactored scripts/adopt-existing-repo.sh to delegate to enrich-project.py
Updated docs/USAGE_PATTERNS.md (concrete enrichment commands for Pattern 1 and 2)
Updated docs/META_PHASES.md (fixed duplicate M4 naming, renumbered M4.5/M5.5/M5-M8)
Updated examples/game-project/README.md (expected structure and setup steps)
Updated examples/saas-project/README.md (expected structure and setup steps)
reviewer_notes: Blocking (fixed): render_claude_md did not respect --force flag
Blocking (fixed): shell scripts used $2 for profile instead of $1
Blocking (fixed): resolve_profile had no cycle detection for extends
Non-blocking: PHASES/QUALITY_GATES/USAGE_PATTERNS copied verbatim (may need downstream customization)
Non-blocking: workflow_scripts allowlist and scaffold_only_docs are hardcoded (could be manifest-driven later)
Non-blocking: template_map duplicates knowledge about which docs have templates
suggested_commit_message: meta-M4: add manifest-driven downstream enrichment flow
